creator: roberto@keltia.freenix.fr
text:
According to cschuber@uumail.gov.bc.ca:
> >Description:
> Please add to /etc/services distribution,
> 
> jetdirect       9100/tcp        hpjd    # HP JetDirect card
> 
> or a facsimilie thereof, to help document the existance of this
> service.

There is another undocumented port used by JetDirect. See Bugtraq's
archives for a lengthy discussion about this. I don't remember it now but
it near this one.
--
